questions.col: Q1: I understand why I was placed in my current role.
Q2: I understand what success looks like in my role over the next 90 days.
Q3: I understand how my role contributes to GCX becoming a Value Center.
Q4: I understand what differentiates performance expectations across levels (e.g., L18 vs L19).
Q5: The new ways of working in my team are clear.
Q6: Decision-making and priorities are clear in the new structure.
Q7: My workload feels manageable during this transition.
Q8: I have received sufficient training for my new responsibilities.
Q9: I feel confident performing the core requirements of my new role.
Q10: I know where to go if I need support.
Q11: I believe placements were handled fairly.
Q12: I believe leveling decisions were applied consistently.
Q13: I feel valued in the new structure.
Q14: I understand what I need to demonstrate to progress to the next level.
Q15: I feel motivated by the direction of this transformation.
Q16: I feel optimistic about GCX’s future.
Q17: I see myself here 12 months from now.
Q18: I would recommend GCX as a place to build a career.
